title: leptogastrodia gracilis
intro: Leptogastrodia gracilis, also known as Chinese potato or tiger's eye, is a type of subterranean tuberous orchid native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Leptogastrodia gracilis include improved cardiovascular health, reduced symptoms of anxiety and depression, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, Leptogastrodia gracilis is often dried and processed into capsules, tablets, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
